response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-adjacent projects, and deep technical fluency across languages and infrastructure — but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or director-level impact required for this role.
strengths: Proven track record in building and open-sourcing scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, MCP tooling)
Extensive full-stack and polyglot engineering experience across cloud, AI-agent, and real-time systems
Demonstrated leadership in technical mentorship, workshops, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience cited
Lacks advanced degree in AI-related field or recognized AI research/publications
Entrepreneurial work is open-source and not tied to corporate AI product innovation
